results.question: what is tag 22
results.description: Single field lookup — returns tag 22 name + description, no enum flood
results.answer_preview: Tag 22 is SecurityIDSource.  Description: Identifies class of alternative SecurityID

results.question: what values can tag 22 have
results.description: Enum lookup — returns enum values for tag 22 including ISIN
results.answer_preview: Tag 22 is SecurityIDSource.  Description: Identifies class of alternative SecurityID  Allowed values:  - 1: CUSIP — CUSIP  - 2: SEDOL — SEDOL  - 3: QUIK — QUIK  - 4: ISINNumber — ISIN number  - 5: RICCode — RIC code  - 6: ISOCurrencyCode — ISO Currency Code  - 7: ISOCountryCode — ISO Country Code  -

results.question: what tag is exec broker
results.answer_preview: Tag 76 is ExecBroker.  Description: Identifies executing / give-up broker. Standard NASD market-maker mnemonic is preferred.

results.question: what tag is execution broker
results.description: Synonym lookup — returns tag 76 ExecBroker via synonym
results.answer_preview: Tag 76 is ExecBroker.  Description: Identifies executing / give-up broker. Standard NASD market-maker mnemonic is preferred.

results.question: what tag can have a value ISIN
results.description: Reverse enum lookup — returns tag 22 SecurityIDSource
results.answer_preview: - Tag 22 (SecurityIDSource) has allowed value 4: ISINNumber — ISIN number.

results.question: which tag is order quantity
results.answer_preview: Tag 38 is OrderQty.  Description: Number of shares ordered. This represents the number of shares for equities or based on normal convention the number of contracts for options, futures, convertible bonds, etc. (Prior to FIX 4.2 this field was of type int)

results.question: which tag is cum qty
results.answer_preview: Tag 14 is CumQty.  Description: Total number of shares filled. (Prior to FIX 4.2 this field was of type int)

results.question: what is last quantity
results.answer_preview: Tag 32 is LastQty.  Description: Quantity of shares bought/sold on this (last) fill. Field not required for ExecTransType = 3 (Status) (Prior to FIX 4.2 this field was of type int)

results.question: which tag is exec qty
results.description: Name lookup — should return a quantity tag, NOT ExecBroker
results.answer_preview: Tag 17 is ExecID.  Description: Unique identifier of execution message as assigned by broker (will be 0 (zero) for ExecTransType=3 (Status)). results.question: which tag is exec quantity
results.description: Name lookup — should return a quantity tag, NOT ExecBroker
results.answer_preview: Tag 53 is Quantity.  Description: Number of shares (Prior to FIX 4.2 this field was of type int)

results.question: which tag is targetcompid
results.answer_preview: Tag 56 is TargetCompID.  Description: Assigned value used to identify receiving firm.
